system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history2_getall","body":"CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_NGUKIM_HISTORY2_GETALL]
AS

DECLARE @currentDate date
DECLARE @fromDate date

SET @currentDate = GETDATE()
SET @fromDate = DATEADD(MONTH, -1, @currentDate)

SELECT A.masp,
  A.mavt, B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac,
  A.soluong, 
  capphat = CONCAT(HWforWW, HWforPacking, HWforAI),
  A.bophan_sudung,
  A.vitri_sudung,
  A.ghichu,
  A.mavt_old, C.mota as mota_old, C.quycach as quycach_old , C.mausac as mausac_old,
  A.soluong_old,
  capphat_old = CONCAT(HWforWW_old, HWforPacking_old, HWforAI_old),
  A.bophan_sudung_old,
  A.vitri_sudung_old,
  A.ghichu_old,
  A.last_modfiers,
  A.last_modfiers_by,
  A.actions_type,
  A.hehang
FROM (
  SELECT A.masp, mavt, soluong,
    HWforWW = IIF(HWforWW = 1, N'Trước sơn,', NULL),
    HWforPacking = IIF(HWforPacking = 1, N'Sau sơn,', NULL),
    HWforAI = IIF(HWforAI = 1, N'AI', NULL),
    bophan_sudung, vitri_sudung, A.ghichu,
    mavt_old, soluong_old,
    HWforWW_old = IIF(HWforWW_old = 1, N'Trước sơn,', NULL),
    HWforPacking_old = IIF(HWforPacking_old = 1, N'Sau sơn,', NULL),
    HWforAI_old = IIF(HWforAI_old = 1, N'AI', NULL),
    bophan_sudung_old, vitri_sudung_old, ghichu_old,
    last_modfiers, last_modfiers_by, actions_type,b.hehang
  FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history2 A
  INNER JOIN tr_sanpham b on a.masp = b.masp
  WHERE A.masp IS NOT NULL
) A
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT mavt, mota, quycach, mausac FROM tr_material WHERE tr_material.xoa = 'N') B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT mavt, mota, quycach, mausac FROM tr_material WHERE tr_material.xoa = 'N') C ON A.mavt_old = C.mavt
WHERE CAST(A.last_modfiers AS date) BETWEEN @fromDate AND @currentDate","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history2","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
